use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING OCULAR BACTERIAL INFECTIONS

indications.text:
OCUFLOX® ophthalmic solution is indicated for the treatment of infections caused by susceptible strains of
the following bacteria in the conditions listed below:
CONJUNCTIVITIS:
Gram-positive bacteria: Gram-negative bacteria:
Staphylococcus aureus Enterobacter cloacae
Staphylococcus epidermidis Haem...
